title: Backlog Item
description: One researched, critiqued, roll-out-ready unit of product work for the Trading-Algo platform. Every field that a reviewer or the rollout machinery relies on is required, so an item cannot silently ship half-specified.

id.description: Stable identifier, e.g. F1. Never reused, never renumbered.

status.description: Lifecycle state. See product/PROCESS.md for the state machine and the Definition of Ready/Done gates.

problem.description: The user/desk problem in one or two sentences. Not the solution.

hypothesis.description: If we build this, we expect <measurable change>. Stated so it can be falsified.

evidence.description: Why we believe the problem is real. At least one item. Grounded in repo files or cited literature — no assertion without a source.

source.description: A repo path (e.g. HANDOFF.md, trading_algo/execution_ibkr.py) or a citation.

role_reviews.description: All four roles must weigh in before an item can leave 'groomed'. This is the critique the request asked for, made structural.

scoring.description: RICE. score is derived: reach * impact * confidence / effort. The validator recomputes and checks it.

acceptance_criteria.description: Binary, testable conditions. An item is only 'done' when every criterion is met and, where measurable=true, backed by a metric or test.

measurable.description: True if backed by a numeric threshold or an automated test/assertion.

metric.description: Required when measurable=true: the threshold or test, e.g. 'PBO < 0.30' or 'tests/test_data_quality.py green'.

invariants_touched.description: Which CLAUDE.md invariants this work risks. Empty array means it demonstrably touches none. See product/PROCESS.md for the mapping.

dependencies.description: Ids of items that must ship first.

concern.description: The single biggest reservation from this role's lens, if any.
